scripts.watch: mkdir -p /usr/src/cert && echo "$TLS__INTERNAL__CRT" > /usr/src/cert/cert.pem && echo "$TLS__INTERNAL__KEY" > /usr/src/cert/key.pem && npx nodemon --watch /usr/src/core -e ts --exec 'trex serve --tls-cert /usr/src/cert/cert.pem --tls-key /usr/src/cert/key.pem --tls-port 33000 --trexas-port 33001 --pgwire-port 5433 --main-path /usr/src/core/server --event-worker-path /usr/src/core/event --enable-inspector --inspector-host 0.0.0.0 --inspector-port 9229 --allow-main-inspector --max-parallelism 1'
scripts.xwatch: mkdir -p ./cert ; echo "$TLS__INTERNAL__CRT" > ./cert/cert.pem & echo "$TLS__INTERNAL__KEY" > ./cert/key.pem & npx nodemon --watch core -e ts --exec './trex start --tls 33000 -p 33001 --key ./cert/key.pem --cert ./cert/cert.pem --sql 5432 --main-service ./core/server --event-worker ./core/event --log-source --inspect=0.0.0.0:9229'
scripts.xinit:d2e: PROJECT_NAME=trex PORT=41100 ENV_TYPE=local npx d2e -n .env.local init
scripts.xstart:d2e: CADDY__CONFIG=../../../.deploy/caddy-config PROJECT_NAME=trex PORT=41100 ENV_TYPE=local npx d2e -e -c docker-compose.yml -n .env.local start
scripts.xbuild:d2e: PROJECT_NAME=trex PORT=41100 ENV_TYPE=local npx d2e -e -c docker-compose.yml build
scripts.xstop:d2e: PROJECT_NAME=trex PORT=41100 ENV_TYPE=local npx d2e -e -c docker-compose.yml stop
scripts.xlogs:d2e: PROJECT_NAME=trex PORT=41100 ENV_TYPE=local npx d2e -e -c docker-compose.yml logs
scripts.xwatchtest: RUST_LOG=info RUST_BACKTRACE=full npx nodemon --watch test -e ts --exec './target/debug/trex start --main-service ./test/main --event-worker ./test/event-manager --sql 25432'
